name: Shader Fix
description: Fix a deliberately broken fragment shader. Success: no shader-error events for 5s after the fix is written.

tasks.name: Fix broken fragment shader
tasks.prompt: The fragment shader in src/shaders/broken.frag has a compile error. Read the shader, diagnose the compile error from the diagnostics, apply the minimal fix, then validate the corrected shader with the triangle_validate_shader tool. Do not touch files outside src/. Report what you changed.
tasks.setup: A project with a deliberately broken fragment shader in src/shaders/broken.frag (undeclared identifier / type mismatch).

successCriteria.description: No shader-error event for 5s after the fix is written.
